tagline: Experience the Joy of Missing Out

hero.headline:
Your Pool, Perfect. Your Weekend,
Yours Again
hero.subheadline: Jacksonville pool owners trust JOMO because we show up every week like clockwork, balance your water with precision LSI testing, and never leave you guessing. Founded by pool owners who got tired of bad service — so you never have to.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Pool Care Designed Around<br class="hidden md:block"> Your Life, Not Ours
services.subtitle: From weekly chemistry balancing to full-service cleaning and equipment repair, every JOMO plan is built so you can skip the work and enjoy the water.

cards.title: AquaJOMO - Water Chemistry
cards.description: Weekly or bi-weekly water chemistry testing and LSI balancing that protects your pool surface and equipment. Science-driven care, not guesswork.

cards.title: SparklingJOMO Plus - Weekly Service
cards.description: Comprehensive weekly cleaning, chemistry balancing, filter and salt cell maintenance, and full equipment inspection. The works, every single week.

cards.title: SparklingJOMO - Bi-Weekly Cleaning
cards.description: Designed for covered salt pools. Includes skimming, brushing, basket cleaning, water balancing, and filter maintenance on a bi-weekly schedule.

cards.title: Pool Equipment Repair
cards.description: Expert diagnostics and repair for pumps, filters, automation systems, and heaters. Quality parts, fast turnaround, and honest pricing on every job.

cards.title: SaltyJOMO - Salt Conversion
cards.description: Full salt system installation and ongoing maintenance. We handle the transition so you can enjoy softer water and lower chemical costs.

cards.title: RoboJOMO - Robotic Cleaner Add-On
cards.description: Supplement your service plan with automated robotic cleaning between visits. Your pool stays cleaner, longer, with zero extra effort from you.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to the Joy of Missing Out

steps.title: Book Your Free Evaluation
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and we'll schedule a free on-site evaluation. Within 24 hours you'll have an honest quote — no pressure, no contracts, no fine print.

steps.title: We Show Up Like Clockwork
steps.description: Our dual-certified technicians arrive on your scheduled day, every single week. LSI water balancing, cleaning, equipment checks — all handled while you're living your life.

steps.title: Experience the JOMO
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready without you lifting a finger. That's the Joy of Missing Out — missing the hassle, not the fun.

about.label: Why Jacksonville Trusts JOMO
about.headline: Founded by Pool Owners Who Were Tired of Bad Pool Service
about.description: In 2020, Mark Slater and John Lewis — two Jacksonville pool owners frustrated with missed visits and poor communication — decided to build the pool company they wished existed. Partnering with industry veteran Chris Wiedegreen, they created JOMO Pool Service on a simple promise: show up every week, balance the water right, and communicate like adults. We pay our technicians above industry average because your pool deserves top talent, and we use LSI water testing at every visit because close enough isn't good enough.

features.title: LSI Water Balancing Every Visit
features.description: We use Langelier Saturation Index testing at every service visit — the gold standard in water chemistry that protects your pool surface and equipment.

features.title: Flat Monthly Fee, Everything Included
features.description: One predictable monthly price covers chemicals, equipment maintenance, and weekly service. No surprise charges, no nickel-and-diming.

features.title: We Show Up. Every. Week.
features.description: No missed visits, no excuses. Our technicians are scheduled, tracked, and accountable. You'll know exactly when we're coming and what we did.

pricing.headline: Flat Monthly Pricing. Zero Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every JOMO plan includes chemicals, equipment checks, and weekly service. Pick what fits your pool — upgrade or cancel anytime.

guarantee.headline: Our "Perfect Pool" Promise
guarantee.description: If your pool isn't perfect after any visit, call us and we'll come back to make it right — no charge, no questions, no runaround. We founded JOMO because we were tired of pool companies that didn't care. Every pool we touch is treated like our own, and we stand behind every single visit.

faqs.question: How quickly can JOMO start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are on the schedule within 3-5 business days. We'll start with a free on-site evaluation to assess your pool's condition and recommend the right service plan. Need emergency help? Call us and we'll get there fast.

faqs.question: What makes JOMO different from other pool companies?
faqs.answer: We were founded by pool owners who experienced bad service firsthand. We use LSI water balancing at every visit (most companies don't), pay our techs above industry average to attract top talent, and charge a flat monthly fee that covers everything — chemicals included. No surprises.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home when your technicians arrive?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most clients provide gate access and go about their day. After each visit, you'll know exactly what was done and how your water chemistry looks. We always make sure gates are secured when we leave.

faqs.question: What is LSI water balancing and why does it matter?
faqs.answer: The Langelier Saturation Index is a scientific formula that measures whether your water is corrosive or scale-forming. By balancing to LSI at every visit, we protect your pool surface, equipment, and plumbing — saving you thousands in long-term repairs most pool owners don't see coming.

faqs.question: Are there contracts or cancellation fees?
faqs.answer: Never. We believe in earning your business every visit, not locking you in. You can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel your plan anytime with zero fees and zero hassle. If we're not delivering, you shouldn't be stuck.

testimonials.name: Andy G.
testimonials.text: Tony has been doing a great job keeping our pool looking great and is always friendly with us and our dogs, always making sure the gates are closed when he leaves.

testimonials.name: Travis C.
testimonials.text: Travis comes to service our pool every week and does a great job. He's always courteous and thorough. Anytime I have a question he always takes time to answer them.

testimonials.name: Chris R.
testimonials.text: Chris, the owner, has a great focus on customer service and has gone out of his way to make my pool spotless. Highly recommend JOMO Pool Service.
